text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Dear me, I think I spaced out for a moment there.
I should hurry and head back.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: The statue of the Three Goddesses...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Hehe... Thank you for always watching over us.
